title: Remove Line Breaks Tool
description: Remove line breaks from text instantly online.
intro: Turn multi-line text into a single line when copied text breaks across emails, PDFs, forms, or chat logs.

faq.q: Does it join all lines into one paragraph?
faq.a: Yes. It removes the line breaks so the text becomes a single continuous line.

faq.q: When is this useful?
faq.a: It is useful when pasted text is broken across many lines and needs to be reused in a form, document, or message.

howTo.lead: Paste the broken text, run the tool, then copy the single-line version.
steps: Paste the text block that contains unwanted line breaks.
Click Remove Line Breaks to join the lines into one continuous string.
Copy the result into your form, document, message, or spreadsheet.

useCases.lead: This is most useful when line breaks are the only thing making the text hard to reuse.
items: Join copied text from PDFs, emails, and exported reports into one line.
Clean multiline addresses or notes before pasting them into a form field.
Fix broken paragraphs before moving the text into a CMS or document.

name: Remove Line Breaks

title: Remove Extra Spaces
description: Clean repeated spaces while keeping your text readable and consistent.
name: Remove Extra Spaces
intro: Paste messy text from email, docs, or PDFs to collapse repeated spaces and tabs without removing line breaks.

faq.a: Yes. It cleans each line separately and keeps the existing line breaks in place.

faq.a: Yes. Leading and trailing spaces on each line are removed while repeated spaces inside the line are collapsed.

howTo.lead: Paste the text, run the cleaner, then copy the cleaned version.
steps: Paste text that contains repeated spaces or tabs into the input box.
Click Remove Extra Spaces to clean each line without flattening the whole block.
Copy the cleaned result back into your document, form, or CMS.

useCases.lead: Most people use this when pasted text looks uneven or hard to reuse.
items: Clean text copied from PDFs, emails, or chat threads before sharing it.
Fix inconsistent spacing before pasting content into spreadsheets or forms.
